description: Login-gated portals (PlanetBids) need PLANETBIDS_USERNAME/PASSWORD or per-source credentials, else document ingest fails with :login_required (seen in test logs). Required for the RFP-PDF -> analyzer -> contact-extraction chain to actually pull documents from those sources. Wire credential storage/use for at least one real login-gated source.

comments.text: FINDING: the credential WIRING already exists and needs no code. GnomeGarden.Procurement.SourceCredentials supports per-source DB credentials + env fallback for :planetbids (PLANETBIDS_USERNAME/PASSWORD), :opengov, :publicpurchase, :sam_gov (SAM_GOV_API_KEY). ListingScanner.ensure_credentials_if_required gates login-gated scans; planetbids_login_js performs the browser login. ACTIVATION (user operational step, not code): set PLANETBIDS_USERNAME/PASSWORD env vars OR add per-source credentials in the DB for a real PlanetBids account, then a requires_login source will scan via authenticated browser session. Cannot be completed here without a real account secret.

title: Wire PlanetBids/portal credentials for login-gated document downloads
